title: 宝塚記念の後に・陰り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's running lacks its usual agility and
tenacity, and the crowd is baffled by her irregular
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must have also been exhausted by the spring
Tenno Sho. But unlike Satono Diamond, she
pushed herself too hard after and wore herself
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is distraught from having
disappointed everyone, but Satono Diamond
gently comforts her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the fans watch Kitasan Black trying her
best, they see themselves in her and want to
cheer her on. They almost certainly don't want to
see her give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but Satono Diamond is hoping the
same. With that said, she leaves Kitasan Black to
find the answers for herself.
